metadata.source: Web research via 5 parallel agents — operator sites, TripAdvisor, Google, Yelp

closed_operators.name: Paradise Helicopters
closed_operators.reason: Closed May 2024 — owner retirement after 25 years

closed_operators.name: Sunshine Helicopters
closed_operators.reason: Closed December 2024 — assets liquidated at auction

closed_operators.name: Feast at Lele
closed_operators.reason: Destroyed August 2023 Lahaina wildfires — no reopening date

closed_operators.name: Atlantis Adventures (Maui)
closed_operators.reason: Temporarily closed — Lahaina Harbor wildfire damage, phased reopening Dec 2025, no sub restart date

operators.name: Blue Hawaiian Helicopters
operators.notes: Largest Hawaii helicopter operator since 1985. Only company on all 4 islands. Airbus EC130 T2 fleet. Custom booking system.

operators.name: Maverick Helicopters
operators.notes: ECO-Star helicopters. Maui + Kauai. Hana Rainforest includes 30-min landing.

operators.name: Jack Harter Helicopters
operators.notes: Originator of Kauai helicopter tours since 1962. Doors-off from $364-399.

operators.name: Mauna Loa Helicopter Tours
operators.notes: Only Big Island operator flying exclusively private tours. Doors on/off at no extra cost.

operators.name: Rainbow Helicopters
operators.notes: Doors-off standard on every tour. Oahu + Kona. Up to 105-min Kilauea tour.

operators.name: Magnum Helicopters
operators.notes: Oahu's oldest helicopter company (1988). Iconic Hughes 500 from Magnum P.I. Exclusively doors-off.

operators.name: Air Maui Helicopters
operators.notes: Only company offering doors-off helicopter tours on Maui. Replacement for closed Sunshine.

operators.name: Old Lahaina Luau
operators.notes: ~$230/adult. Sells out months in advance. Lei greeting, premium open bar, 4-course dinner.

operators.name: Chief's Luau
operators.notes: At Wet 'n' Wild Hawaii, Kapolei. Aloha Experience ~$130, Paradise Package ~$180+.

operators.name: Polynesian Cultural Center
operators.notes: Full-day cultural experience + Ali'i Luau on North Shore. Includes HA: Breath of Life show.

operators.name: Voyagers of the Pacific Luau
operators.notes: At Royal Kona Resort, Kailua-Kona. Oceanfront. Samoan fire dance finale.

operators.name: Hawaiiloa Luau
operators.notes: At Fairmont Orchid, Kohala Coast. Every Saturday. Produced by Island Breeze Productions.

operators.name: Luau Kalamaku
operators.notes: At Kilohana Plantation, Lihue. Theatrical story-driven show (Tahitian voyaging narrative).

operators.name: Smith's Family Garden Luau
operators.notes: In 30-acre tropical garden, Wailua. Polynesian revue with 6 Pacific cultures.

operators.name: Pride of Maui
operators.notes: 65-ft catamaran. Molokini Crater + Turtle Town. Waterslide, BBQ lunch, optional SNUBA.

operators.name: Four Winds Maui
operators.notes: Only Maui vessel with glass-bottom viewing room. Morning Molokini + afternoon Coral Gardens.

operators.name: Trilogy Excursions
operators.notes: Family-owned 50+ years. Exclusive Hulopo'e Marine Preserve (Lanai) access. Also whale watch.

operators.name: Sail Maui
operators.notes: Performance sailing catamarans (Paragon fleet). Snorkeling + whale watch (Dec-Mar).

operators.name: Fair Wind Cruises
operators.notes: 50+ years in Kona. Kealakekua Bay (Captain Cook Monument). Also manta ray night snorkel.

operators.name: Hawaii Nautical
operators.notes: Hawaii's largest family-operated ocean fleet. Turtle Canyon snorkel from Kewalo Basin.

operators.name: Capt Andy's Sailing Adventures
operators.notes: Na Pali Coast specialist. Star Snorkel BBQ Sail + raft expeditions. Also whale watch (Dec-Apr).

operators.name: Blue Dolphin Charters
operators.notes: Two largest catamarans on Kauai (65-ft). Niihau + Na Pali Coast. Also whale watch (Dec-Mar).

operators.name: Pacific Whale Foundation
operators.notes: Nonprofit research org. 97% sighting rate, whale guarantee. Also snorkeling ecotours.

operators.name: Ultimate Whale Watch
operators.notes: Since 1982, ranked #1 Maui whale watch. Raft-style low-to-water vessels. Hydrophone.

operators.name: Calypso Maui
operators.notes: Maui's only triple-deck catamaran. Glass-bottom viewing. Most affordable whale watch.

operators.name: Body Glove Cruises
operators.notes: 2.5hr Kona whale watch with hydrophone. Also known for snorkeling/diving.

operators.name: Star of Honolulu
operators.notes: Hawaii's largest vessel. 4 decks + 60ft observation deck. ADA-compliant. Jan-Mar.

operators.name: E Noa Tours
operators.notes: Oahu's largest Pearl Harbor and historical Honolulu tour operator. 5 Pearl Harbor packages.

operators.name: Royal Star Hawaii
operators.notes: Pearl Harbor specialist. Standard ($99), Deluxe ($124), Ultimate ($158). Free Waikiki transport.

operators.name: Discover Hawaii Tours
operators.notes: Locally owned since 1995. 50+ daily Pearl Harbor departures. Multi-island day-trip packages.

operators.name: Go Tours Hawaii
operators.notes: 100% locally-owned. Hidden Gems of Oahu cultural tours. Strong cultural storytelling.

operators.name: Kualoa Ranch
operators.notes: Jurassic Park filming location. ATV, horseback, zip, movie site tours. 4,000 acre ranch.

operators.name: Coral Crater Adventure Park
operators.notes: Zipline, ATV, free-fall jump, climbing wall. Near Ko Olina on Oahu's west side.

operators.name: Roberts Hawaii
operators.notes: Oldest tour company in Hawaii. Multi-island. Also airport shuttles and group transport.

operators.name: Polynesian Adventure Tours
operators.notes: Multi-island circle island and half-day tours. Budget-friendly.

operators.name: Kailani Tours Hawaii
operators.notes: Big Island volcano specialist. National Park-certified guides. Kilauea, Black Sand Beach, Kona coffee.

operators.name: Valley Isle Excursions
operators.notes: Premier Road to Hana and Haleakala Sunrise operator. Includes Waianapanapa State Park admission.

operators.name: Temptation Tours
operators.notes: Luxury Road to Hana. Limo-van fleet, max 8 guests. 30+ years. Breakfast + 3-course lunch.

operators.name: Kohala Zipline
operators.notes: Only full canopy zipline on Hawaii Island. 8 lines, 6 sky bridges, rappel. Zip & Dip includes waterfall.

operators.name: Kipu Ranch Adventures
operators.notes: Premier Kauai ATV/UTV operator. Jurassic Park filming locations. Operates Tue-Fri.

operators.name: Kauai Tour Guy
operators.notes: Private-only Waimea Canyon and South/West Side tours. Your group only.

operators.name: Atlantis Adventures (Waikiki)
operators.notes: Hawaii's dominant submarine operator. 48-passenger sub, dives 100ft. Uses Rezgo booking.

operators.name: Atlantis Adventures (Kona)
operators.notes: Same brand as Waikiki. 48-passenger sub explores 25-acre coral reef. From King Kamehameha Hotel.

operators.name: Island Water Sports Hawaii
operators.notes: Submarine scooter (self-propelled electric underwater scooter), not traditional sub. Maunalua Bay.

operators.name: Magic Sportfishing
operators.notes: 50ft Pacifica sport-fisher yacht. Private + shared charters. Kewalo Basin, Honolulu.

operators.name: Boom Boom Sportfishing
operators.notes: 50ft luxury sportfisher. Shared 4hr $250, private up to 12hr $2,100. Waianae Boat Harbor.

operators.name: Strike Zone Maui
operators.notes: 100+ years combined crew experience. Shared bottom fish + combo trips. Maalaea Harbor.

operators.name: Finest Kind Sportfishing
operators.notes: Operating since 1972. 3 boats. Relocated to Maalaea post-Lahaina fire.

operators.name: Humdinger Sportfishing
operators.notes: 50+ years in Kona. Custom Rybovich tournament boat. Honokohau Harbor.

operators.name: High Noon Sportfishing
operators.notes: TripAdvisor Hall of Fame 10 consecutive years. Kona.

operators.name: Ohana Fishing Charters
operators.notes: Family-owned since 2005. Shared and private 4-8hr charters.

operators.name: Go Fish Kauai
operators.notes: Bertram 38 Convertible (41ft). Nawiliwili Harbor, Lihue.

operators.name: Hans Hedemann Surf School
operators.notes: Established Waikiki school. Locations in Waikiki, Kahala, North Shore. Private with Hans $400.

operators.name: Jamie O'Brien School of Surf
operators.notes: Pro surfer Jamie O'Brien's branded school at Twin Fin Waikiki. 90-min lessons at Publics.

operators.name: North Shore Oahu Surf School
operators.notes: North Shore at Chun's Reef. 100% stand-up guarantee. FareHarbor confirmed.

operators.name: Royal Hawaiian Surf Academy
operators.notes: Hawaiian-owned, since 1998. 'Powered by FareHarbor' in footer.

operators.name: Surf Club Maui
operators.notes: Family-run in Kihei, 30+ years. Also SUP and kids camps.

operators.name: Secret Food Tours Honolulu
operators.notes: International brand. 3-3.5hr Waikiki walking tour, 12 max. Malasadas, poke, shave ice.

operators.name: Hawaii Food Tours
operators.notes: Led by Matthew Gray. 'Hole-in-the-Wall Tour' 5hr minivan of Honolulu/Chinatown.

operators.name: Stardust Hawaii
operators.notes: Most popular food tour on Maui. Progressive meal, off-the-beaten-path spots. Hotel pickup.

operators.name: Tasting Kauai
operators.notes: 7 walking food tours across Kauai regions. All $114, 2.5-3hrs. FareHarbor confirmed.

operators.name: Kona Tasting Tours
operators.notes: 2.5hr walking tour on Ali'i Drive, Kona. 7 stops. FareHarbor confirmed.
